list.name: pc_id
list.label: PC
list.query: SELECT pc_id FROM pc_info WHERE is_active = true AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' ORDER BY pc_id

list.name: severity
list.label: Severity
list.query: All : .*, HIGH : HIGH, MEDIUM : MEDIUM, LOW : LOW, NORMAL : NORMAL

options.content:
LAB-01 Security Operations Center
Overview · 실시간 이상 탐지 · AI 판단 · Resource Top3
Overview PC Detail AI Judgment

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pc_info WHERE is_active = true AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pc_info p LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT severity FROM anomaly_history WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 1) a ON true WHERE p.is_active = true AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND (a.severity IS NULL OR a.severity IN ('NORMAL','LOW'))

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pc_info p JOIN LATERAL (SELECT severity FROM anomaly_history WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 1) a ON true WHERE p.is_active = true AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND a.severity = 'MEDIUM'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS value FROM pc_info p JOIN LATERAL (SELECT severity FROM anomaly_history WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 1) a ON true WHERE p.is_active = true AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND a.severity = 'HIGH'
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pc_id) AS value FROM ai_judgment_history WHERE judged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND (verdict = 'MINING' OR judgment = 'MINING')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pc_id) AS value FROM ai_judgment_history WHERE judged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND (verdict = 'HEAVY_LOAD' OR judgment = 'HEAVY_LOAD')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pc_id) AS value FROM ai_judgment_history WHERE judged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND (verdict = 'HW_ERROR' OR judgment = 'HW_ERROR')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pc_id) AS value FROM ai_judgment_history WHERE judged_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND (verdict = 'NORMAL' OR judgment = 'NORMAL')

SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE a.severity IS NULL OR a.severity IN ('NORMAL','LOW'))::float / NULLIF(COUNT(*),0) AS value FROM pc_info p LEFT JOIN LATERAL (SELECT severity FROM anomaly_history WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC LIMIT 1) a ON true WHERE p.is_active = true AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'
SELECT AVG(COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float, (scores->>'final')::float, (scores->>'total')::float, 0)) AS value FROM anomaly_history WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'

panels.title: 🖥 PC 상태 모니터맵
panels.description: PC-01~PC-40 상태를 Canvas 모니터 카드 형태로 표시합니다. 클릭 시 PC Detail로 이동합니다.

text.fixed: LIVE PC STATUS  |  click a monitor to open PC Detail

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    p.pc_id,
    CASE COALESCE(a.severity, 'NORMAL')
      WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 3
      WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2
      WHEN 'LOW' THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END AS status_value
  FROM pc_info p
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT severity
    FROM anomaly_history
    WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id
    ORDER BY detected_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) a ON true
  WHERE p.is_active = true
    AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-01'), 0) AS "PC-01",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-02'), 0) AS "PC-02",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-03'), 0) AS "PC-03",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-04'), 0) AS "PC-04",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-05'), 0) AS "PC-05",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-06'), 0) AS "PC-06",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-07'), 0) AS "PC-07",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-08'), 0) AS "PC-08",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-09'), 0) AS "PC-09",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-10'), 0) AS "PC-10",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-11'), 0) AS "PC-11",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-12'), 0) AS "PC-12",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-13'), 0) AS "PC-13",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-14'), 0) AS "PC-14",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-15'), 0) AS "PC-15",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-16'), 0) AS "PC-16",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-17'), 0) AS "PC-17",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-18'), 0) AS "PC-18",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-19'), 0) AS "PC-19",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-20'), 0) AS "PC-20",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-21'), 0) AS "PC-21",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-22'), 0) AS "PC-22",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-23'), 0) AS "PC-23",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-24'), 0) AS "PC-24",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-25'), 0) AS "PC-25",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-26'), 0) AS "PC-26",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-27'), 0) AS "PC-27",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-28'), 0) AS "PC-28",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-29'), 0) AS "PC-29",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-30'), 0) AS "PC-30",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-31'), 0) AS "PC-31",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-32'), 0) AS "PC-32",

  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-37'), 0) AS "PC-37",
  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-38'), 0) AS "PC-38",

  COALESCE(MAX(status_value) FILTER (WHERE pc_id = 'PC-40'), 0) AS "PC-40"
FROM latest;

panels.title: 🚨 현재 이상 PC 피드

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT
    p.pc_id,
    COALESCE(a.severity, 'NORMAL') AS severity,
    COALESCE(a.anomaly_type, '') AS type,
    a.detected_at AS time,
    COALESCE(
      (a.scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float,
      (a.scores->>'final')::float,
      (a.scores->>'total')::float,
      0
    ) AS score
  FROM pc_info p
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT severity, anomaly_type, detected_at, scores
    FROM anomaly_history
    WHERE pc_id = p.pc_id
    ORDER BY detected_at DESC
    LIMIT 1
  ) a ON true
  WHERE p.is_active = true
    AND p.pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'
)
SELECT
  time,
  pc_id,
  severity,
  type,
  ROUND(score::numeric, 2) AS score
FROM latest
WHERE severity IN ('MEDIUM', 'HIGH')
  AND severity ~ '${severity}'
  AND pc_id ~ '${pc_id}'
ORDER BY
  CASE severity
    WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1
    WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2
    ELSE 3
  END,
  score DESC,
  time DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 12

panels.description: PC별 최신 anomaly 상태 기준으로 현재 MEDIUM/HIGH 상태인 PC를 표시합니다. Canvas PC 상태 모니터맵과 같은 최신 상태 기준입니다.

panels.title: 🌱 추정 CO₂e (최근 1시간)
panels.description: CPU/GPU 사용률 기반으로 최근 1시간 전력 사용량을 추정하고, 전력 배출계수 0.4594 kgCO₂e/kWh를 곱해 계산한 값입니다. 실측값이 아닌 추정값입니다.

targets.rawSql:
WITH samples AS (
  SELECT
    pc_id,
    collected_at,
    LEAD(collected_at, 1, NOW()) OVER (PARTITION BY pc_id ORDER BY collected_at) AS next_at,
    (50 + COALESCE(cpu_percent, 0) * 0.65 + COALESCE(gpu_percent, 0) * 1.50) AS est_power_w
  FROM metrics_history
  WHERE collected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
    AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'
), energy AS (
  SELECT
    (est_power_w * GREATEST(0, LEAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAST(next_at, NOW()) - collected_at)), 300)) / 3600.0) / 1000.0 AS kwh
  FROM samples
)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(kwh), 0) * 0.4594 AS value
FROM energy

panels.title: 🌿 절감 가능 CO₂e (최근 1시간)
panels.description: 최근 이상 상태 PC를 정상 기준 전력으로 조치한다고 가정했을 때 줄일 수 있는 초과 탄소배출량 추정값입니다. 기준: baseline 80W, 전력 배출계수 0.4594 kgCO₂e/kWh.

targets.rawSql:
WITH abnormal AS (
  SELECT pc_id
  FROM (
    SELECT
      pc_id,
      severity,
      ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC) AS rn
    FROM anomaly_history
    WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours'
      AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%'
  ) x
  WHERE rn = 1
    AND severity IN ('LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH')
), samples AS (
  SELECT
    m.pc_id,
    m.collected_at,
    LEAD(m.collected_at, 1, NOW()) OVER (PARTITION BY m.pc_id ORDER BY m.collected_at) AS next_at,
    GREATEST((50 + COALESCE(m.cpu_percent, 0) * 0.65 + COALESCE(m.gpu_percent, 0) * 1.50) - 80, 0) AS excess_w
  FROM metrics_history m
  JOIN abnormal a ON a.pc_id = m.pc_id
  WHERE m.collected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour'
), energy AS (
  SELECT
    (excess_w * GREATEST(0, LEAST(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (LEAST(next_at, NOW()) - collected_at)), 300)) / 3600.0) / 1000.0 AS kwh
  FROM samples
)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(kwh), 0) * 0.4594 AS value
FROM energy

SELECT detected_at AS time, pc_id AS metric, COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float, (scores->>'final')::float, (scores->>'total')::float, 0) AS anomaly_score FROM anomaly_history WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND pc_id ~ '${pc_id}' AND severity ~ '${severity}' ORDER BY 1

WITH latest AS (SELECT pc_id, severity, COALESCE((scores->'score_breakdown'->>'final')::float, (scores->>'final')::float, (scores->>'total')::float, 0) AS score, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY pc_id ORDER BY detected_at DESC) rn FROM anomaly_history WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour') SELECT pc_id, score, severity FROM latest WHERE rn = 1 AND pc_id ~ '${pc_id}' ORDER BY score DESC LIMIT 10

panels.title: CPU TOP3 (최근 15분)
panels.description: 최근 15분 평균 기준 Top 3. AI 판단의 근거가 되는 resource 사용량 보조 패널.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pc_id, AVG(cpu_percent) AS v FROM metrics_history WHERE collected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND cpu_percent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pc_id ORDER BY v DESC LIMIT 3

panels.title: GPU TOP3 (최근 15분)
panels.description: 최근 15분 평균 기준 Top 3. AI 판단의 근거가 되는 resource 사용량 보조 패널.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pc_id, AVG(gpu_percent) AS v FROM metrics_history WHERE collected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND gpu_percent IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pc_id ORDER BY v DESC LIMIT 3

panels.title: VRAM TOP3 (최근 15분)
panels.description: 최근 15분 평균 기준 Top 3. AI 판단의 근거가 되는 resource 사용량 보조 패널.

targets.rawSql: SELECT pc_id, AVG(vram_mb) AS v FROM metrics_history WHERE collected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '15 minutes' AND pc_id LIKE 'PC-%' AND vram_mb IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pc_id ORDER BY v DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT date_trunc('hour', detected_at) AS time, EXTRACT(HOUR FROM detected_at AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Seoul')::text AS hour, COUNT(*) AS value FROM anomaly_history WHERE detected_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days' AND severity IN ('MEDIUM','HIGH') GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1
